title: Sticker-Surrounded Central Subject Editorial Card
sourceTitle: Scrapbook Sticker Editorial Card AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Handmade scrapbook-style editorial card centered on ceramic matcha latte cup with tiny flower charm, surrounded by tactile cut-out sticker elements and short caption SLOW AFTERNOON. Subject: ceramic matcha latte cup with tiny flower charm stays as the central readable hero object while tea leaves, washi tape scraps, doodled stars, ticket stubs, and torn cream labels form a playful layered paper halo around it. Scene: Clean editorial card surface with handmade paper texture, uneven cut edges, tiny tape pieces, torn labels, soft imperfect shadows, and tactile scrapbook depth. Composition: Fixed central subject with a loose radial sticker arrangement; elements slightly overlap but remain organized, less rigid than a perfect circle, with layered paper depth and clear subject readability. Signature Elements: Cut-out sticker halo, uneven edges, paper texture, soft imperfect shadows, small tape pieces, torn labels, radial-but-loose arrangement, and handmade playful layering. Style: Handmade tactile editorial collage, artistic scrapbook card, playful layered cut-outs, subtle paper grain, imperfect shadows, and polished yet human craft finish. Color Palette: Fixed warm paper neutrals with soft ink accents, natural sticker colors, cream label tones, and gentle shadow contrast. Lighting: Soft tabletop editorial lighting with shallow paper shadows, subtle edge highlights, and believable layered depth. Typography: SLOW AFTERNOON appears as a short printed or handwritten caption on one small torn label, not as a dominant poster headline. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Composition: Fixed central subject with a loose radial sticker arrangement; elements slightly overlap but remain organized, less rigid than a perfect circle, with layered paper depth and clear subject readability. Signature Elements: Cut-out sticker halo, uneven edges, paper texture, soft imperfect shadows, small tape pieces, torn labels, radial-but-loose arrangement, and handmade playful layering. Style: Handmade tactile editorial collage, artistic scrapbook card, playful layered cut-outs, subtle paper grain, imperfect shadows, and polished yet human craft finish. Color Palette: Fixed warm paper neutrals with soft ink accents, natural sticker colors, cream label tones, and gentle shadow contrast. Lighting: Soft tabletop editorial lighting with shallow paper shadows, subtle edge highlights, and believable layered depth. Typography: SLOW AFTERNOON appears as a short printed or handwritten caption on one small torn label, not as a dominant poster headline. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.
